info.title: Slay The Switch
info.author: Owen
info.details:
Slay the Switch is a simple roguelike deck builder built for Nintendo Switch. Each run has you climbing through a series of encounters, choosing your path, fighting enemies, and improving your deck along the way.

Start with a small set of cards and grow it over time by picking rewards, buying from shops, and upgrading at campfires. Different enemy types, branching paths, and random events keep each run a little different.

You can play in standard runs with a set ending or switch to endless mode and see how far you can go. Track your best runs with stats like floors climbed, enemies defeated, and total coins collected.

Built as a lightweight project, the focus is on quick runs, simple mechanics, and a clean gameplay loop that’s easy to pick up and play.

changelog:
v1.0.0

Initial release

Full roguelike deckbuilder experience with map progression, combat, cards, shops, campfires, endless mode, and run tracking.

For full details, see:
https://github.com/omueller5/SlayTheSwitch/releases/tag/v1.0.0
